DevOps_Engineer.title: DevOps Engineer
duties: Designing and implementing build, deployment, and configuration management
Building and testing automation tools for infrastructure provisioning
Handling code deployments in all environments
Monitoring metrics and developing ways to improve this process
Brainstorming new ideas and ways to improve development delivery
Building, maintaining and monitoring configuration standards
Maintaining day‑to‑day management and administration of projects
Managing CI and CD tools with team
Documenting and designing various processes and updating existing ones
Improving infrastructure development and application development
